prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan VR38DETT (3.8L V6 twin-turbo) with a custom bellhousing adapter from *SP Engineering* to mate with the Avantime's 6-speed manual transaxle (F40-6, sourced from a Renault Espace V6). Retain the original AWD system via a *Quaife ATB differential* and *GKN Driveline* CV joints for durability under increased torque (target: 650 Nm at 3,500 RPM). Turbocharger upgrade to *Garrett GTX4202R* with *Tial MV-R* wastegates and *HKS SSQV* blow-off valves, paired with a *Pectel SQ6M* standalone ECU for precise boost control (2.2 bar peak).

Custom *Brembo GT-R* 6-piston calipers (380mm front, 355mm rear) with *DBA 5000 Series* two-piece rotors, paired with *Ferodo DS2500* pads and *Goodridge G-Stop* braided stainless steel lines. Suspension overhaul with *Öhlins Road & Track DFV* coilovers (custom valving for the Avantime's 2,800mm wheelbase) and *SuperPro* polybushings for the rear multi-link setup, including *Whiteline* adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear).

Exhaust system by *Milltek Sport* with 3.5-inch mandrel-bent stainless steel piping, *Scorpion* 100-cell catalytic converters, and *Akrapovič* titanium quad-exit tips (positioned in the original rear valance cutouts). Intake system features a *K&N XStream* ram-air setup with a *Mishimoto* aluminum intercooler (custom core dimensions: 600x300x76mm) and *Samco Sport* silicone hoses. Fuel system upgrade includes *ID1000* injectors, *Walbro 450 LPH* in-tank pump, and a *Radium Engineering* surge tank for consistent fuel delivery under lateral G-forces.
estetica: Full *Liberty Walk LB Works* widebody kit (custom-fabricated for the Avantime's unique roofline and rear hatch), including front fenders extended by 50mm, rear quarter panels widened by 70mm, and a *Seibon Carbon* hood with a functional scoop for the intercooler. Rear diffuser by *Rieger Tuning* with integrated *DTM-style* exhaust outlets and *Aeromotions* active rear wing (adjustable via a *Motec PDM15* for drag reduction at speed).

Custom *Rotiform LAS-R* 20x10.5 ET25 (front) and 20x12 ET35 (rear) forged wheels with *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2* tires (275/30/20 front, 315/25/20 rear). Wheel arches rolled and pulled by *The Install Bay* to accommodate the wider track, with *H&R* 30mm spacers up front for aggressive stance. Full *PPF (Paint Protection Film)* in *XPEL Stealth* applied to the entire body, including the *Saint-Gobain* panoramic glass roof.

Interior retrim by *Recaro* with *Pole Position* seats (carbon-fiber shells, Alcantara inserts) and *Schroth* 6-point harnesses. Dashboard and door cards wrapped in *Nappa leather* with *Sparco* carbon-fiber trim, including a *Motec C127* digital dash replacing the original instrument cluster. Audio system upgrade to *Focal Utopia Be* components (165mm woofers, 25mm tweeters) with a *Helix DSP.3* processor and *Bowers & Wilkins* subwoofer in the original spare wheel well.
